title: Minimum For Maximum
description: Mod focused on streamlining tedious processes for maximum efficiency and output.
body:
# MinForMax

Tired of building massive, laggy mob farms that take up half your world? MinForMax introduces a high-tech, compact solution for resource generation. From data collection to advanced matter replication, this mod provides a streamlined path to automating mob loot, experience, and block production.

## Key Features

**Scanning & Indexing**: Begin your journey by crafting a **Scanner**. Once you've scanned a mob, craft a **Memory Shard** and use the Index Inscriber to encode the mob's data onto the shard.
![Scanner in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/874f236fd898e59bdde8f5d582fcc0d4f4aec104.png)
   
**Eternal Generators**: Power your base with mob loot and XP using the Eternal Generator.
      - **Distinct Tiers**: Progress through increasing levels of efficiency and speed.
      - **Module Support**: Enhance your generators with specialized modules to customize output.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/345905e92b14a7fe15a6176868e5fe00ab895d05.png)
   
**Replication**: Beyond mob loot, automate your building materials with the **Block Replicator** and **Fluid Replicator**.

**Smart Automation**: All machines feature **auto-export** functionality, automatically pushing generated items into adjacent storage containers—no extra pipes required.

**Upgrade System**: Fine-tune your production line with specialized upgrades:
-  **Speed Upgrade**: Increase the rate of production.
-  **Stack Upgrade**: Process larger quantities at once.
-  **Extra Drop Upgrade**: Maximise the loot yield by generating extra items for the same price.

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee132a83bbb9a9e092e2fcf979bdbe2c104ab971_0.webp)

### Getting Started
1. Craft the **Scanner** and find the mob you want to automate.
2. Use the **Index Inscriber** to write that data to a **Memory Shard**.
3. Provide **Energy** to your **Eternal Generator** and insert the shard to start producing loot!

### Why download
If you enjoy the logic of mods like _Deep Mob Learning_ or _Industrial Foregoing_ but want a fresh system that integrates energy usage, machine tiers, and a highly customizable backend, this mod is for you. It scales from early-game automation to late-game resource abundance.

## 🛠Information for Modpack Developers
This mod is designed with high configurability to fit any progression style. Almost every aspect of the generation process—including mob loot tables, module rewards, and replication recipes—can be overhauled to match your pack's balance.
> For detailed instructions on how to format the JSON, add custom mob data, or modify replication costs, please refer to our developer [documentation](https://github.com/yasinskislava/MinimumForMaximum/blob/main/README.md)
